targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT namespace) FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' AND (namespace LIKE 'tenant-%' OR namespace LIKE 'Your cluster-%' OR namespace = 'Your cluster')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pod) FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' AND (namespace LIKE 'tenant-%' OR namespace LIKE 'Your cluster-%' OR namespace = 'Your cluster')

WITH last AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (namespace, pod, container) namespace, pod, container, cpu_millicores FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '2 minutes' AND (namespace LIKE 'tenant-%' OR namespace LIKE 'Your cluster-%' OR namespace = 'Your cluster') ORDER BY namespace, pod, container, time DESC) SELECT ROUND(SUM(cpu_millicores)::numeric, 0) FROM last

WITH last AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (namespace, pod, container) namespace, pod, container, memory_mib FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '2 minutes' AND (namespace LIKE 'tenant-%' OR namespace LIKE 'Your cluster-%' OR namespace = 'Your cluster') ORDER BY namespace, pod, container, time DESC) SELECT ROUND(SUM(memory_mib)::numeric, 0) FROM last

WITH last_pr AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (namespace, pod, container) namespace, pod, container, cpu_millicores, memory_mib FROM pod_resource WHERE time > NOW() - interval '2 minutes' ORDER BY namespace, pod, container, time DESC), agg AS (SELECT namespace, COUNT(DISTINCT pod) AS pods, ROUND(SUM(cpu_millicores)::numeric, 0) AS cpu_m, ROUND(SUM(memory_mib)::numeric, 0) AS mem_mib FROM last_pr WHERE namespace LIKE 'tenant-%' OR namespace LIKE 'Your cluster-%' OR namespace = 'Your cluster' GROUP BY namespace), logs5m AS (SELECT tags->>'namespace' AS namespace, COUNT(*) AS log_lines, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE level='error') AS errors FROM logs WHERE time > NOW() - interval '5 minutes' AND (tags->>'namespace' LIKE 'tenant-%' OR tags->>'namespace' LIKE 'Your cluster-%' OR tags->>'namespace' = 'Your cluster') GROUP BY namespace) SELECT a.namespace, a.pods, a.cpu_m, a.mem_mib, COALESCE(l.log_lines, 0) AS log_lines_5m, COALESCE(l.errors, 0) AS errors_5m FROM agg a LEFT JOIN logs5m l USING (namespace) ORDER BY mem_mib DESC NULLS LAST
